docs.text: dd-dataverse-ingest-cli ¶ CLI for dd-dataverse-ingest SYNOPSIS ¶ ingest start-import [ -s | --single-deposit ] [ -c | --continue-batch ] <path> ingest get-import-status [ <location> ] ingest cancel-import <path> ingest convert-dans-import-bag [ -s | --single-deposit ] <path> For more information on a subcommand use: ingest <subcommand> --help
docs.title: Introduction

docs.text: ingest start-import [ -s | --single-deposit ] [ -c | --continue-batch ] <path> ingest get-import-status [ <location> ] ingest cancel-import <path> ingest convert-dans-import-bag [ -s | --single-deposit ] <path> For more information on a subcommand use: ingest <subcommand> --help
docs.title: SYNOPSIS

docs.text: Context ¶ This module is a component in the DANS Data Station Architecture .
docs.title: Context

docs.text: This module is a component in the DANS Data Station Architecture .
docs.title: Context

docs.text: Description ¶ The dd-dataverse-ingest-cli is a command-line interface for the dd-dataverse-ingest service. It allows you to manage import jobs. Use ingest <command> --help for more information on a specific command.
docs.title: Description

docs.text: The dd-dataverse-ingest-cli is a command-line interface for the dd-dataverse-ingest service. It allows you to manage import jobs. Use ingest <command> --help for more information on a specific command.
docs.title: Description

docs.text: Development ¶ General information about developing DANS modules can be found here .
docs.title: Overview

docs.title: Development

docs.text: Installation ¶ Currently, this project is built as an RPM package for RHEL8 and later. The RPM will install the binaries to /opt/dans.knaw.nl/dd-dataverse-ingest-cli , the example configuration file to /etc/opt/dans.knaw.nl/dd-dataverse-ingest-cli and links to the command from /opt/bin . Building from source ¶ Prerequisites: Java 17 or higher Maven 3.3.3 or higher RPM Steps: git clone https://github.com/DANS-KNAW/dd-dataverse-ingest-cli.git cd dd-dataverse-ingest-cli mvn clean install
docs.title: Installation
